commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f01e1322206a0189103208a38555dafc087a04c1)
commands.review_summary:
The branch wires QA alternate models into generated fallback config and live workflow defaults, tightens Slack allowlist-block setup, and keeps WhatsApp credential fingerprints out of public-redacted artifacts.

PR surface: Source +25, Tests +51, Config +1. Total +77 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main accepts an alternate QA model but emits strict `{ primary }` agent model objects, and the model fallback contract requires explicit `fallbacks`; the Slack allowlist-block gap is also visible from the current scenario config.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; this protected maintainer draft needs human review and live QA proof acceptance before merge.

target.title: fix(qa): wire live fallback models
target.body:
## Summary
- Wire QA `--alt-model` into gateway model fallback config for defaults and the `qa` agent.
- Add a live QA fallback model variable, defaulting to `openai/gpt-5.4`, so secret-backed live lanes do not duplicate the gpt-5.5 primary as their only candidate.
- Fix Slack allowlist-block coverage so both account owner allowlist and channel users are blocked.
- Keep WhatsApp credential fingerprints out of public-redacted CI artifacts; they only appear when metadata redaction is disabled.

## Verification
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/qa-lab/src/qa-gateway-config.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/shared/live-gateway.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/whatsapp/whatsapp-live.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Autoreview: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean after fixes.
- AWS Crabbox changed gate: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
  - provider: `aws`
  - lease: `cbx_3dbaaefaf427`
  - run: `run_7396117815c5`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: live QA gateway children now get a configured fallback model when `--alt-model` differs from `--model`; Slack block scenario now genuinely blocks the driver; WhatsApp public artifacts keep credential identifiers redacted.
Real environment tested: local focused Vitest and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: see Verification.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed, autoreview passed, and remote `pnpm check:changed` exited 0.
Observed result after fix: gateway config includes fallback models without changing strict single-model behavior when primary and alternate match; Slack scenario config blocks both owner and channel allowlist paths; WhatsApp public redaction omits credential identifiers and stable fingerprints.
What was not tested: refreshed secret-bearing QA-Lab full live run is being dispatched against this PR head after this update.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
